name_cn:
🆕 M41815 Light Coffee
LOCKME Backpack
Made of soft leather with a signature twist-lock design, this Lockme backpack enriches the versatile Lockme series with a fresh look. Lightweight, feminine, and lively, it is the ideal companion for the modern woman's daily life: can be carried as a shoulder bag or worn on the back for added functionality. Dimensions: 22.0 x 28.0 x 13.0 cm
